result.finding: Web Application with REST API. The project is a Spring Boot MVC web application that uses Thymeleaf for server-side HTML rendering and also exposes a REST endpoint (VetController returns JSON for /vets.json). It is not a pure REST API — HTML views are the primary interface.
evidence: Spring Boot web/REST annotations found (Spring MVC @Controller, @RequestMapping)
Thymeleaf templates found under src/main/resources/templates/ (owners, pets, vets, welcome views)
VetController produces both HTML view and JSON (application/json) for /vets endpoint
values: Web Application (server-side rendered HTML with Thymeleaf)
